overview.value: Seraphim is a specialist investor in SpaceTech, backing technologies that strengthen global security, enable resilient infrastructure, and address the planet's most urgent challenges. Its platform spans the full innovation lifecycle, from idea to IPO, through venture capital funds, a listed growth-stage fund, and an accelerator program. The organisation manages over 630 million dollars in assets under management, and its portfolio and alumni companies have raised over 12 billion dollars.
